name: The Sex Room
description:
Tags: Aphrodisiac, Character Creation, Corruption, Mind Break

You are trapped in an apartment with someone else and both of you cannot leave until you cum 100 times!

Make your own partner, and slowly make them more addicted to you.

You and your partner will be experimented on, and many kinks will be involved, like bimbofication, breast expansion, dick growth, aphrodisiacs, mind break, etc.

Have fun!

If you don't know what partner you want to make, just ask the bot to make a random partner, if the bot breaks by naming the character "The Sex Room" just make it remake the message.

If there's an error or something that would make the bot better, just tell me and I'll do everything to add that
